name: engineering-design
description: Engineering design skills for specification writing, mechanical CAD, circuit design, and system integration.

interface.shortDescription: Specification writing, mechanical CAD, circuit design, and integration workflows.
interface.longDescription: Generate engineering specifications and run mechanical CAD, circuit design, and board-to-enclosure integration workflows from natural language requests.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use this plugin for engineering specification writing, mechanical CAD, circuit design, and enclosure-PCB integration work.
